# FinaMedica — Technical Documentation

> Auto-generated by codebase analysis on 2026-04-05

---

## 1. Overview

**FinaMedica** is a multi-tenant, web-based medical practice management system (clinic ERP) built for the Georgian healthcare market. It handles the full clinical and administrative lifecycle of a medical facility: patient registration, appointment scheduling, visit management, medical service execution, pharmacy/inventory management, staff (HR) management, financial operations (cash, bank, vendor/customer orders), and regulatory integration with the Georgian Revenue Service (RS) waybill system and the Ministry of Health EHR service.

The system is consumed exclusively through a browser-based single-page application (AngularJS 1.x frontend) that communicates with a .NET 6 ASP.NET Core MVC/API backend, backed by a Microsoft SQL Server database. Authentication is delegated to an external FIN account service (`http://account.fina24.ge/`) and session state is maintained server-side.

## 3. Solution Structure

```
FinaMedica.sln
│
├── FinaMedica/                   # Main ASP.NET Core MVC web application (entry point)
│   ├── Program.cs                # Application host entry point (IWebHost)
│   ├── Startup.cs                # DI registration, middleware pipeline
│   ├── appsettings.json          # Connection strings (per-tenant), language config
│   ├── Controllers/              # 35+ MVC and API controllers
│   ├── Repositories/             # Data access layer (interface + implementation pairs)
│   ├── Models/                   # EF Core entity/domain models (~250+ entities)
│   ├── ViewModels/               # DTOs for API responses and view binding
│   ├── InternalModels/           # Internal request/response models, session models
│   ├── Utils/                    # Services: DataContext (EF), SqlHelper, BusinesHelper,
│   │                             #   DataHelper, FuncHelper, UserManagement, SmsSenderJob,
│   │                             #   CryptoSecurity, LoggingHelper, RsServiceFuncs, Enums
│   ├── Filters/                  # ASP.NET Core action filters (ValidateUserSession,
│   │                             #   ModelLogAttribute, ModelLogValueAttribute)
│   ├── Extensions/               # IApplicationBuilder / IServiceCollection extensions
│   ├── TagHelpers/               # Custom Razor Tag Helpers (hotel/med panel headers)
│   ├── Views/                    # Razor views (Default, Main, Medical, Report, System…)
│   ├── Languages/                # JSON localization files (ka-GE, en-US, ru-RU)
│   ├── App_Data/                 # menu.json (navigation menu config), report.sql
│   ├── Connected Services/EHRService/  # WCF proxy to Georgian MoH EHR SOAP service
│   └── wwwroot/static/           # Frontend assets: AngularJS controllers, services,
│                                 #   compiled bundles (Gulp), CSS, templates, images
│
└── ExcelExport/                  # Class library: Excel import/export logic
    ├── Export.cs                 # Generates styled .xlsx via EPPlus
    ├── Import.cs                 # Parses .xlsx into generic dictionaries via EPPlus
    └── Models/                   # ExcelColumnViewModel, ExcelRowModel, ExportListModel,
                                  #   ImportModel
```

| Project | Type | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `FinaMedica` | ASP.NET Core 6 Web App | Main application: API, MVC views, business logic, data access |
| `ExcelExport` | .NET 6 Class Library | Reusable Excel export/import library using EPPlus |

## 4. Architecture

### 4.1 Architectural Style

**Layered monolith (n-tier)** with some aspects of modular design. The entire system is deployed as a single ASP.NET Core process. There is no microservice decomposition, message bus, or event sourcing. The layers are explicitly separated into Controllers → Services/Helpers → Repositories → DataContext/SqlHelper → SQL Server, but all live in one deployable project.

The frontend is a **separate-concern SPA** (AngularJS 1.x) served as static files from `wwwroot/static`, communicating with the backend exclusively through JSON REST API endpoints. View rendering (Razor) is used only for the login page and printable documents (waybills, reports).

### 4.2 Layer / Slice Breakdown

| Layer | Folder / Class | Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| **Presentation (API)** | `Controllers/` | Exposes REST API endpoints; maps HTTP verbs to repository calls; enforces session auth via `[ServiceFilter(typeof(ValidateUserSession))]` |
| **Presentation (MVC)** | `Controllers/DefaultController`, `MedicalController`, `ReportController`, `SystemController` | Renders Razor views for login, medical panels, reports, and system tools |
| **Application Services** | `Utils/BusinesHelper`, `Utils/DataHelper`, `Utils/FuncHelper` | Cross-cutting business logic: document numbering, self-cost calculation, product pricing, menu loading, licence validation |
| **Domain / Repository** | `Repositories/` | Interface-segregated data access; 30+ repository classes; each maps to a business domain (Medical, ProductIn, CustomerOrder, etc.) |
| **Infrastructure (ORM)** | `Utils/DataContext` | EF Core `DbContext` with ~250 `DbSet<>` properties; connection string resolved at runtime from session (multi-tenant) |
| **Infrastructure (ADO)** | `Utils/SqlHelper` | Raw `SqlConnection` / `SqlCommand` queries for complex stored-procedure-style SQL execution and dynamic results |
| **Infrastructure (Jobs)** | `Utils/SmsSenderJob` | Quartz.NET `IJob` implementation; runs daily (08:00–23:00) to send appointment reminder SMS messages |
| **Infrastructure (External)** | `Utils/UserManagement` | HTTP client calls to `account.fina24.ge` for authentication |
| **Infrastructure (External)** | `Utils/RsServiceFuncs` | SOAP/XML integration with Georgian Revenue Service (`services.rs.ge`) waybill and NTOS services |
| **Infrastructure (External)** | `Connected Services/EHRService` | WCF-generated proxy to Georgian Ministry of Health EHR service (`ehr.moh.gov.ge`) |
| **Infrastructure (Logging)** | `Extensions/LogConfigureHandler` | Sends unhandled exception details via HTTP POST to a remote log aggregator |
| **Cross-cutting** | `Filters/ValidateUserSession` | Session validation action filter applied to all protected controllers |
| **Cross-cutting** | `Utils/LoggingHelper`, `Utils/CryptoSecurity` | Audit logging with reflection-based change detection; AES-256-CBC password encryption |
| **Frontend SPA** | `wwwroot/static/scripts/` | AngularJS 1.x application: controllers, services, utils, compiled with Gulp |
| **Excel I/O** | `ExcelExport/` | Standalone library referenced by `FinaMedica` for spreadsheet generation and parsing |

### 4.3 Communication Patterns

**Synchronous (REST/HTTP)**
- All frontend ↔ backend communication is JSON over HTTP through conventional ASP.NET Core attribute-routed API controllers (`[Route("api/med")]`, `[Route("api/rs")]`, `[Route("api/dashboard")]`, etc.).
- No gRPC or GraphQL is used.
- External authentication calls go to `http://account.fina24.ge/api/users/checkuser` (POST with JSON) via `HttpClient`.
- Revenue Service waybill integration uses raw SOAP XML over HTTP to `http://services.rs.ge/WayBillService/WayBillService.asmx` (`RsServiceFuncs`).
- Ministry of Health EHR integration uses a WCF-generated proxy connected to `http://ehr.moh.gov.ge:88/WS.asmx` (`Connected Services/EHRService/Reference.cs`).
- Exception telemetry is pushed via `HttpClient` POST to `http://185.139.56.218:8088/api/log/set` (`LogConfigureHandler`).

**Asynchronous**
- SMS reminders via the Quartz.NET scheduled job (`SmsSenderJob`) — not queue-based; the job polls the database for pending SMS records and sends them via an external SMS gateway using parameters stored in the `Param` table.
- No message broker (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus, Kafka, etc.) is in use.

**Session**
- User authentication state is stored in ASP.NET Core server-side session (`ISession`), keyed as `"FinaUser"`, serialized as JSON using the `SessionExtensions` helper.
- Session idle timeout: **12 hours**. Cookie sliding expiration also set to 12 hours.

### 4.4 Data Storage & Access

**Database**
- **Microsoft SQL Server** (single database per tenant company).
- Multi-tenant: `appsettings.json` maps company codes to connection strings under `Data:DefaultConnection:{key}`. The active connection string is stored in session after login and resolved in `DataContext.OnConfiguring()` at every request.

**ORM**
- **Entity Framework Core 6.0.8** (`Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer`).
- `DataContext` (`FinaMedica/Utils/DataContext.cs`) contains ~250 `DbSet<>` properties spanning all domain areas: medical, inventory, HR, hotel, restaurant, POS, finance, etc.
- No migrations directory detected — schema is managed externally (likely by a separate DBA script or migration tool not included in this repository).
- EF Core `AsNoTracking()` is used in read-heavy repository methods for performance.

**Raw SQL**
- `SqlHelper` (`FinaMedica/Utils/SqlHelper.cs`) provides async `DynamicQuery()` methods using `SqlConnection` + `SqlCommand` directly. Used for complex queries, self-cost calculations, and raw data reporting where EF LINQ would be insufficient. `CommandTimeout` is set to 720 seconds for heavy report queries.

**Caching**
- `IMemoryCache` (in-process) is used in `FuncHelper` to cache language string dictionaries (10-hour absolute expiry) and navigation menus.
- No distributed cache (Redis, etc.) is configured.

---

## 5. Design Patterns

| Pattern | Evidence (File / Class) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Repository** | `Repositories/IMedicalRepository` + `MedicalRepository`, `IProductInRepository` + `ProductInRepository`, and 30+ other interface/implementation pairs | Each domain area has its own interface and implementation, registered as `AddScoped` in DI |
| **Dependency Injection / IoC** | `Startup.cs` (`ConfigureServices`) | Built-in ASP.NET Core DI container; all repositories and helpers registered as `Scoped`; `SqlHelper` as `Singleton` |
| **Action Filter (Chain of Responsibility)** | `Filters/ValidateUserSession.cs` | Implements `ActionFilterAttribute`; applied via `[ServiceFilter(typeof(ValidateUserSession))]` on every protected controller; redirects to `/Default` if session is absent |
| **Decorator / Custom Attribute** | `Filters/ModelLogAttribute.cs`, `Filters/ModelLogValueAttribute.cs` | Property-level attributes used by `LoggingHelper` to discover loggable fields via reflection |
| **Options Pattern** | `Startup.cs` — `services.Configure<FormOptions>`, `services.Configure<GzipCompressionProviderOptions>`, `services.Configure<QuartzOptions>` | Standard ASP.NET Core options pattern for configuring framework components |
| **Facade** | `Utils/BusinesHelper.cs` (`IBusinesHelperService`) | Aggregates cross-cutting business operations (document numbers, product self-cost, payment helpers, config params) used across all repositories and controllers |
| **Facade** | `Utils/DataHelper.cs` (`IDataHelperService`) | Wraps EF Core and SqlHelper calls for common data lookups (units, currencies, companies, etc.) |
| **Scheduled Job / Background Worker** | `Utils/SmsSenderJob.cs` (implements `Quartz.IJob`) + `services.AddQuartzHostedService()` in `Startup.cs` | Quartz.NET job hosted as an `IHostedService` via `QuartzHostedService`; sends SMS reminders on a daily cron schedule |
| **Strategy (Localization)** | `Repositories/JsonConfigurationStringLocalizer.cs`, `JsonConfigurationStringLocalizerFactory.cs`, `Extensions/JsonLocalizationServiceCollectionExtensions.cs` | Replaces default .resx resource localization with a JSON-file strategy; factory resolved from DI; language selected from session at runtime |
| **Custom Extension Methods** | `Extensions/SessionExtensions.cs`, `Extensions/ViewRenderToStringExtensions.cs`, `Extensions/ResponseCompressionMimeTypes.cs` | Extension method pattern to extend `ISession` (JSON serialize/deserialize) and `Controller` (render view to string for printable waybills) |
| **Singleton** | `Startup.cs` — `services.AddSingleton<SqlHelper>()` | `SqlHelper` is registered as a singleton; it resolves the connection string dynamically per call via `IHttpContextAccessor` |
| **Adapter (SOAP)** | `Utils/RsServiceFuncs.cs` | Adapts the Revenue Service SOAP XML API into typed C# method calls; constructs raw XML envelopes and parses XDocument responses |
| **Domain Enum / Value Object** | `Utils/Enums.cs` (`DocTypes` enum with `[Description]` attributes) | Encodes known document type codes with descriptive labels; used with `StaticHelper.GetValueFromDescription<T>()` for reverse lookup |
| **Result Object** | `InternalModels/ResultModel.cs` | Standardized `{Id, Error, Message}` return type used across API endpoints to convey operation success/failure |
| **Middleware Pipeline** | `Startup.Configure()` | ASP.NET Core middleware pipeline: forwarded headers → session → response compression → routing → endpoints → static files |

## 6. API Surface

All API controllers inherit from `Controller` and are protected by `[ServiceFilter(typeof(ValidateUserSession))]` unless noted otherwise.

### MVC (View-rendering) Controllers

| Controller | Route | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `DefaultController` | `/Default/Index` (GET/POST) | Login page; handles authentication and session initialization |
| `DefaultController` | `/Default/PasswordRecovery` | Password recovery view |
| `MedicalController` | `/Medical/Index` | Medical reception/visit panel view |
| `MedicalController` | `/Medical/DoctorCabinet` | Doctor's cabinet view |
| `MedicalController` | `/Medical/MedicalRecord` | Medical records view |
| `MedicalController` | `/Medical/MedStaffSchedulePanel` | Staff schedule panel view |
| `ReportController` | `/Report/Index` | Report navigation hub |
| `ReportController` | `/Report/TableReport?tag=...` | Tabular report view by tag |
| `ReportController` | `/Report/ChartReport?tag=...` | Chart report view by tag |
| `ReportController` | `/Report/MedicalDashboard?tag=...` | Medical analytics dashboard |
| `SystemController` | `/System/ExecuteQuery` (GET/POST) | Admin raw SQL query execution tool |
| `ProductShippingController` | `/api/productshipping/getWaybill?id=...` | Renders printable waybill Razor view as HTML string |

### REST API Controllers

| Controller | Base Route | Key Endpoints |
|---|---|---|
| `MedicalApiController` | `api/med` | `getPatients`, `searchPatients`, `advancedSearchPatients`, `selectPatients`, `checkPatient`, `searchTemplates`, `selectTemplate`, and many more medical workflow endpoints |
| `MainController` | (no prefix) | `CheckLicensePacketLimit()`, product/service management, staff management, financial operations (mixed MVC + API style) |
| `DashboardApiController` | `api/dashboard` | `expences` (POST), `medical` (POST — returns visit/payment analytics) |
| `RsApiController` | `api/rs` | `getRsData`, `connect`, `saveRSData`, `activateWayBill`, `closeWayBill`, `cancelWayBill` |
| `AdvancedApiController` | `api/advanced` | Advanced report/query endpoints |
| `ProductShippingController` | `api/productshipping` | `saveProductShipping`, `getProductShipping`, `getProducts`, `getWaybill` |
| `AdditionalColumnController` | (scoped route) | Additional dynamic column management |
| `CustomerOrderApiController` | (scoped route) | Customer order CRUD |
| `CustomerReturnApiController` | (scoped route) | Customer return CRUD |
| `CustomReportApiController` | (scoped route) | Custom report execution |
| `DocumentApiController` | (scoped route) | Document management |
| `MaintenanceApiController` | (scoped route) | Maintenance workflow |
| `OperationApiController` | (scoped route) | Generic operations |
| `ProductCancelApiController` | (scoped route) | Product cancellation documents |

| `ProductMoveApiController` | (scoped route) | Inter-store product transfer |
| `ProductOutApiController` | (scoped route) | Product dispatch |
| `ProductOutDocApiController` | (scoped route) | Product dispatch document |
| `ProductOutSingleApiController` | (scoped route) | Single-item product out |
| `ProductProcessApiController` | (scoped route) | Product processing workflow |
| `ProductStartApiController` | (scoped route) | Initial product stock setup |
| `ProductVirtualMoveApiController` | (scoped route) | Virtual product movement |
| `RemainderApiController` | (scoped route) | Inventory remainder/balance |

**Default route pattern:** `{controller=Default}/{action=Index}/{id?}` (configured in `Startup.Configure`).

## 7. Configuration & Secrets Management

### Configuration Loading

Configuration is loaded in `Startup.cs` using ASP.NET Core's `ConfigurationBuilder`:

```csharp
new ConfigurationBuilder()
    .SetBasePath(env.ContentRootPath)
    .AddJsonFile("appsettings.json", optional: false, reloadOnChange: true)
    .AddEnvironmentVariables();
```

The configuration root is stored as a static property: `Startup.Configuration`.

### `appsettings.json` Structure

```json
{
  "Data": {
    "DefaultConnection": {
      "<company-code>": "<SQL Server connection string>"
    }
  },
  "Languages": {
    "<hostname>": "<culture-code>"
  },
  "MenuVersion": <int>
}
```

- **`Data:DefaultConnection`** — maps short company database identifiers to full SQL Server connection strings (hostname, catalog, credentials). Multiple tenants are supported by adding more keys.
- **`Languages`** — maps hostnames to default language culture codes (e.g., `"ka-GE"` for Georgian).
- **`MenuVersion`** — an integer that drives cache-busting for the navigation menu JSON.

### Secrets Management

- **Database credentials** are stored in plain text inside `appsettings.json` (the sample shows `sa` user with a plaintext password). **No secret manager, Azure Key Vault, or environment-variable injection is used in the detected configuration.**
- The project has a `UserSecretsId` (`6f4b7e7b-255d-45a5-b91d-3160e521dab0`) configured in `FinaMedica.csproj`, indicating the developer may have used ASP.NET Core User Secrets locally, but no secrets file is present in the repository.
- **Password hashing:** user passwords are encrypted with AES-256-CBC via `CryptoSecurity.Encrypt()` / `Decrypt()` with a hard-coded passphrase, salt, and IV embedded in the class. This is not a true password hashing scheme (no random salt per user); it is symmetric encryption meaning passwords are recoverable.
- **RS (Revenue Service) credentials** (username, password for waybill API) are stored in the database `Param` table, retrieved at runtime by `BusinesHelper.GetConfigParamValue()`.
- **SMS gateway credentials** are stored in the `Param` table (keys: `SMS_UserName`, `SMS_Password`, `SMS_ClientId`, `SMS_ServiceId`, `SMS_Package`).

### Environment Variables

- `ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT`: set to `Development` in `launchSettings.json` for IIS Express and direct Kestrel profiles.
- No production-specific environment variable configuration or `appsettings.Production.json` override files were detected.

## 8. Deployment & Infrastructure

### Build

- **MSBuild / Visual Studio 2022** (`VisualStudioVersion = 17.0.32112.339`).
- Frontend assets are bundled using **Gulp 4** (`gulpfile.js`): AngularJS scripts are annotated (`gulp-ng-annotate`), minified (`gulp-uglify-es`), and concatenated (`gulp-concat`) into the `wwwroot/static/dist/` folder.
- The project publishes to IIS (`<UseIISIntegration()>` configured in `Program.cs`) with a `web.config` present for IIS hosting.

### Hosting

- **IIS (Internet Information Services)** is the target host, as evidenced by `Program.cs` (.`UseIISIntegration()`), `web.config`, and the IIS Express profile in `launchSettings.json`.
- The application listens on `http://localhost:12045/` (IIS Express) or `http://localhost:12046/` (Kestrel direct).
- **No Docker, Kubernetes, or any containerization** is configured.

### CI/CD

- Source control is **Team Foundation Version Control (TFVC)** connected to an Azure DevOps Server at `http://devops-server:8080/finacollection` (detected in the `.sln` `TeamFoundationVersionControl` section).
- No CI/CD pipeline definition files (`.github/workflows`, `azure-pipelines.yml`, `Jenkinsfile`) were found in the repository. Pipeline configuration exists on the Azure DevOps Server but is not committed alongside the source code.

### Infrastructure-as-Code

- **None detected.** No Terraform, Bicep, ARM templates, Helm charts, or Pulumi files are present.

### Environments

- **Development** — defined in `launchSettings.json` via `ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development`. Developer exception page is always enabled (`app.UseDeveloperExceptionPage()` is unconditional in `Startup.Configure` — this should be guarded by environment check in production).
- **Production** — implied (separate IIS server), but no explicit environment-specific configuration files are committed.

---

## 9. Testing Strategy

**No automated tests were found in this solution.** The solution file (`FinaMedica.sln`) declares exactly two projects: `FinaMedica` and `ExcelExport`. No xUnit, NUnit, MSTest, Moq, or test container references are present in any `.csproj` file.

Manual/exploratory testing is likely the primary QA approach. The `SystemController.ExecuteQuery` endpoint provides a privileged in-application SQL execution console, which may serve as an ad-hoc debugging and validation tool (access is session-gated).

| `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` | 6.0.8 | Replaces System.Text.Json with Newtonsoft in the MVC pipeline; handles reference loop ignoring |

| `System.ServiceModel.Http` | 4.8.x | WCF HTTP binding; used by the EHR WCF proxy (`Connected Services/EHRService`) for MoH integration |
| `Microsoft.AspNet.WebApi.Client` | 5.2.9 | `HttpClient`-based JSON helpers; supports communication with the external authentication service (`account.fina24.ge`) |
| `NSwag.ApiDescription.Client` | 13.0.5 | Design-time code generation for potential OpenAPI/Swagger client proxies |
| `WebEssentials.AspNetCore.PWA` | 1.0.65 | Progressive Web App support (service worker + web manifest); **currently commented out** in `Startup.cs` |
| `AngularJS` (npm) | 1.7.8 | The frontend SPA framework; all UI screens are AngularJS controllers and services |
| `jqwidgets-framework` (npm) | 8.0.0 | Comprehensive widget library providing grids, schedulers, charts, and other complex UI components |
| `moment` (npm) | 2.24.0 | Date/time parsing and formatting throughout the AngularJS frontend |

## 11. Notable Implementation Details

### 11.1 Multi-Tenant Connection String Resolution at Runtime

`DataContext.OnConfiguring()` resolves the SQL Server connection string **on every DbContext instantiation** by reading from the current HTTP session (`"FinaUser"` → `Domain` field). This means a single deployed application binary serves multiple clinic databases; the tenant is selected at login time. This is an unusual approach and creates a tight coupling between the ORM infrastructure and the HTTP session.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Utils/DataContext.cs`, method `OnConfiguring`.

### 11.2 Session-Based Authentication (No ASP.NET Core Identity)

The system does **not use ASP.NET Core Identity**. Authentication is:
1. Credentials POSTed to `DefaultController.Index`.
2. Forwarded to the external `account.fina24.ge` service via `UserManagement.CheckUser()`.
3. On success, a `SessionModel` object is serialized into `ISession["FinaUser"]`.
4. All subsequent requests are authorized by `ValidateUserSession` checking whether the session key exists.

There are no bearer tokens, JWT, OAuth2, or cookie-based identity claims. Password encryption uses AES-256-CBC with a **hardcoded key** in `CryptoSecurity` — not a salted hash.

### 11.3 Reflection-Based Audit Logging

`LoggingHelper.BooksLogging()` uses .NET reflection at runtime to compare old and new values of properties decorated with `[ModelLogAttribute]`. It generates a `Logging` record with a list of `LoggingItem` (before/after values) for each changed property. This is stored in the `Loggings` / `LoggingItems` EF Core tables.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Utils/LoggingHelper.cs`

### 11.4 Georgian Language Number-to-Words Converter

`NumberToString.cs` implements a full Georgian-language number-to-words converter (e.g., for printing invoice amounts in words on financial documents), including Georgian-specific vigesimal counting rules (twenties-based system: "ოც", "ორმოც", "სამოც"…).

**File:** `FinaMedica/Utils/NumberToString.cs`

### 11.5 Quartz.NET SMS Sender Job — Multi-Tenant Iteration

`SmsSenderJob` iterates over **all** connection strings in `appsettings.json` and connects to each tenant database independently to process SMS reminders. This means one job instance handles all tenants sequentially. The cron schedule is `0 0 8-23 ? * * *` (every hour from 08:00 to 23:00).

**File:** `FinaMedica/Utils/SmsSenderJob.cs`

### 11.6 Revenue Service (rs.ge) SOAP Integration

`RsServiceFuncs` integrates directly with the Georgian Revenue Service SOAP endpoints for electronic waybill management (`WayBillService`) and NTOS (tax clearance) over raw HTTP using manually constructed XML envelopes and `XDocument` response parsing — not via a WCF proxy. Credentials are fetched from the database `Param` table at construction time.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Utils/RsServiceFuncs.cs`

### 11.7 Unconditional Developer Exception Page

`Startup.Configure()` always calls `app.UseDeveloperExceptionPage()` without an environment check. In production this exposes full stack traces and internal paths to any client. This is a security concern.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Startup.cs`, line `app.UseDeveloperExceptionPage()`.

### 11.8 Static Files Served with Pre-compressed Gzip Support

The `UseStaticFiles` configuration manually injects `Content-Type: text/javascript` and `Content-Encoding: gzip` for files ending in `.js.gz`, allowing pre-compressed JavaScript bundles to be served directly without runtime compression overhead.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Startup.cs`, `Configure()` method.

### 11.9 Menu and Reports Driven by JSON Configuration

Navigation menus are defined in `App_Data/menu.json` (Georgian-language menu items) and loaded at runtime by `FuncHelper.GetMainMenu()`. Report definitions are stored in the `Report`, `ReportColumn`, and `ReportControl` database tables and fetched by `ReportRepository`. This allows adding new menu sections or report screens without recompiling.

**File:** `FinaMedica/App_Data/menu.json`, `FinaMedica/Repositories/ReportRepository.cs`

### 11.10 License Enforcement via Base64-Encoded Key

`MainController.CheckLicensePacketLimit()` reads a `LocalLicense` value from the `Param` database table, Base64-decodes it, and splits on `.` to extract the company code and packet tier (e.g., `"1-2"`, `"3-5"`, `"6-10"`, `"11-20"`). The tier limits how many active staff members can be added. This is a basic client-side license check with no server-side validation.

**File:** `FinaMedica/Controllers/MainController.cs`, `CheckLicensePacketLimit()`.
